evals.name: commit-only
evals.prompt: Commit these finished changes locally; do not push or open a PR.
evals.expected_output: Runs final artifact inventory and read-back, then project quality gate, inspects diff, stages named files only, creates a Conventional Commit, verifies status, and stops without asking PR layout or publishing.

evals.name: cohesive-single-auto-selection
evals.prompt: Open a PR for this finished, cohesive feature and its tests.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes one cohesive review unit, selects a single PR, and proceeds without asking topology, including under auto.

evals.name: stack-recommendation-choice
evals.prompt: Open a PR for a change with a shared protocol layer, dependent implementation, and final wiring.
evals.expected_output: Names the independently reviewable ordered layers, recommends stacked PRs, and asks stacked versus one PR before any commit or branch-layout mutation.

evals.name: explicit-single-authoritative
evals.expected_output: Treats the explicit single-PR choice as authoritative, skips the topology question, then runs durable-write and quality gates, commits named files, pushes, creates with explicit base/head and --body-file, and verifies via gh pr view.

evals.name: ambiguous-review-shape
evals.prompt: Open a PR for this finished branch; the changes share a goal but may form separable layers.
evals.expected_output: Explains the competing cohesion and layer evidence, recommends the best-supported option, and asks single versus stacked before mutation rather than silently choosing.

evals.name: pr-plan-cannot-override-explicit-choice
evals.prompt: Use one PR. A supplied pr_plan recommends a stack.
evals.expected_output: Keeps the explicit single-PR choice, skips the topology question, and treats the plan only as non-authoritative review-shape evidence.

evals.name: existing-pr-no-choice
evals.prompt: Push these fixes to the PR already open for this branch.
evals.expected_output: Does not ask layout. Detects ordinary versus stack metadata, commits safely, then uses the matching update path and verifies the PR.

evals.name: write-failure-halts
evals.prompt: Open a PR, but the promised ADR write fails read-back.
evals.expected_output: Halts before just check, staging, commit, push, or PR creation; reports a {target, backend, verified:false} completion row.

evals.name: hallouminate-fallback
evals.prompt: Publish this repo; hallouminate is unavailable and the implementation made a durable design decision.
evals.expected_output: Writes and reads back a tracked docs/adr fallback, includes it in the commit, and does not hand-edit a wiki.

evals.name: graphite-post-merge
evals.prompt: The bottom Graphite PR merged. Sync and republish the remaining stack.
evals.expected_output: Uses gt sync, gt log short, and gt submit --stack; never bare rebase or single-branch push.

evals.name: git-town-post-merge
evals.prompt: The bottom Git Town PR merged. Catch up the rest.
evals.expected_output: Uses git town sync --stack and git town branch. Conflict recovery uses git town continue/skip, not bare git rebase continuation.

evals.name: gh-stack-post-merge
evals.prompt: The bottom gh stack PR merged. What should happen locally?
evals.expected_output: Uses gh stack sync to pull server-cascaded state and gh stack view; submits only for unpublished local commits.

evals.name: stack-without-boundaries
evals.expected_output: After the topology choice, asks for commit/file split boundaries rather than inventing them.

evals.name: hard-final-state
evals.expected_output: Runs final writing gate and validation before giving hard-cheese the final artifact inventory and completion rows, then publishes only if the gate passes.
